titleStmt.title: SII 9.532: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 532. (A.R. No. 200 of 1910.) ON SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE ANKALAMMA TEMPLE AT ADHAMANKOTTAI, DHARMAPURI TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This incomplete record is dated Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Bhādrapada, śu. 5, correspond ing to A.D. 1530 August 27, Saturday or 28 Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Immaḍi Achyutadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records a gift of the toll-revenue raised in the fair held in the presence of the god Bhairavadēva, for the service of the same god by Kāmiyappa-Nāyaka, son of Bommiyappa-Nāyaka, by reviving the fair.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīvijayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśa
kavarṣa 1452 varuṣakke saluva vikrutinaṁvatsarada bhā
drapada śu 5 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara pūrva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttara cetusa
mudrādhīśvara vīrapratāpa Aśvapatigajapatikoṇḍa
śūḷa mūvarāyaragaṁḍa yimmaḍi Acyutadēvamahā
rāyaru stirasiṁhāsanadalli sukhadiṁ prithvīrājya
geyyuttiralu śrībhairavadēvara saṁnadhiya saṁte kila
vāgiralāgi pratihuṭṭisi Aḷḷu Aḍi kāsu saha dravyamu
khadiṁ dēvara dīpārādhanege śrīmanmahānāyaṁ
kācāryya pāluvallaṭara bappanāyakara kumāraru ma
dde boṁmiyappanāyakara sukumāra kāmiyappanāyaka
ru kaṭṭaḷeyanikki dēvadāya hoṟagāgi sarvvamānyavāgi bi
ṭṭa dēvadāyada saṁteyādāyakke Aḷupidavaru vāraṇā
siyalli brāhmaṇana koṁda pāpadalli gaṁgeyalli ka
pileya koṁda pāpadalli tamma guru daiva mātru pitru
gaḷige tappida pāpadalli hōharu Athavā kakkulike bi
ṭṭu pasaradalli kayyanikkidavaru yēḷēḷu jalmadalliyu
narekavē gatiyāgi bidduhoraḷuvaru suṁka taḷavā
ṟa Ānupu magame calavādi saṁgeḍi paṁtagāṟarigū
Idē bhāṣe �yo dēvadāyada mānyakke Āvanānobba bā
ḍi baḍita taṁdavana bāyi kōṣṭa �yo bhāṣege �voṟida
varu taṁma yaimānikeyanu pantagāṟanige koṭṭavaru En
du bareda śāsana kāmappanāyakara hēḷikeya baraha
svadattadviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . para
dattā(na)pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Ā paṁtagāṟanu saṁteya pasaradalli kayanikkidare
Digital edition of SII 9.532 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
